Kane (415.982.1510) for defendant Leonardo Bautista

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Most of the issues raised have been fully briefed and considered by the Court previously, and the Court sees no reason to change its decisions. Nor is the Court inclined to disturb the jury's verdict on the basis of any issue raised by Mr. Bautista. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E.
